zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothy de Standish於大約1335年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾度波利時，她的父親John Standish50歲，母親Margaret de Everingham44歲。她於1353年與William de Farrington在英國英格蘭藍卡爾利藍德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1397年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothy de Standish于大约1335年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾度波利时，她的父亲John Standish50岁，母亲Margaret de Everingham44岁。她于1353年与William de Farrington在英国英格兰藍卡爾利藍德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1397年在英国英格兰藍卡爾享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Standish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Standish (Lancashire, now part of Greater Manchester), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + edisc ‘enclosure, enclosed park’. Standish (Gloucestershire) does not appear to have contributed towards the surname.

History: Myles Standish (c. 1584–1656) was a soldier of fortune, from 1620 captain of the Mayflower Pilgrims at Plymouth Colony. Little is known of his origins and early life, but in his will he claimed to be descended from a leading Catholic family, the Standishes of Standish, Lancashire, England. He also claimed to have been deprived of his inheritance, a claim not confirmed.

variants.name: Standage
meanings: in Leicestershire and Buckinghamshire, the name may alternatively be from Stanedge Grange in Hartington Nether Quarter or Stanage End in Outseats (both Derbyshire); but evidence is needed for this. The placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ecg ‘edge, escarpment’.

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothy de Standish was born about 1335, in Duxbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Standish, was 50 and her mother, Margaret de Everingham, was 44. She married William de Farrington in 1353, in Leyland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1397, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothy de Standish est née environ 1335, à Duxbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Standish, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Margaret d’Everingham, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé William de Farrington en 1353, à Leyland, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1397, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dorothy de Standish um 1335 in Duxbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Standish 50 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Everingham 44. Sie hat 1353 in Leyland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom William de Farrington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1397 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy de Standish è nata il circa 1335 nel Duxbury, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Standish, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Everingham, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato William de Farrington nel 1353, nel Leyland, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1397, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy de Standish(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 드스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Standish(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Everingham(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1353년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 리랜드에서 William de Farrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1397년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.
